heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 460t–4 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated not more than $780,000 for the acquisition of land and interests in land pursuant to this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1972— increased the authorization of appropriations from not more than $355,000 to not more than $780,000.Pub. L. 92–272
amendments: Amendments1972— increased the authorization of appropriations from not more than $355,000 to not more than $780,000.Pub. L. 92–272
